headline: YES BANK tops S&P Global CSA 2025 rankings, enhancing ESG credibility among Indian banks
what_matters: YES BANK now leads Indian peers in ESG disclosure, closing the score gap and increasing peer pressure for others.
May improve talent attraction and customer trust, but no quantifiable effect at this stage.
Aligns with BRSR, GRI, and DJSI frameworks; no regulatory penalties or deadlines triggered.
